package rulecoverage

func NegativeTickerWithoutStop() string {
    ruleID := "ticker_without_stop"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "time.NewTicker(...) is created without an observed Stop() call."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
